title: [CombToArith] Explicitly handle wide shifts to avoid UB

features.name: shift left with shift amount exceeding operand width
features.description: Code should include a shift left operation where the shift amount is equal to or greater than the operand width, producing all-1s result

features.name: unsigned shift right with shift amount exceeding operand width
features.description: Code should include an unsigned shift right operation where the shift amount is equal to or greater than the operand width, producing all-1s result
